steps.title: Identify what the blank needs to do
steps.content: The sentence reads: "Land ______ his technology to invent the world's first instant camera." The blank is the main verb of the clause — the sentence has a subject (Land) and needs a finite, fully conjugated verb to be grammatically complete.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong forms and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Check each choice against that requirement:
  • Choice A — 'used': Finite past-tense verb — completes the clause correctly. ✓
  • Choice B — 'to have used': An infinitive phrase — cannot serve as a main verb. ✗
  • Choice C — 'to use': An infinitive — cannot serve as a main verb. ✗
  • Choice D — 'using': A participle — cannot serve as a standalone main verb. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
